title: Rednaxela Optimized 2
body:
If you need a fast way of getting many mods for optimization, pvp, and gameplay, but dont want to download all of the mods yourself? Then this modpack is for you. 

# WHY SHOULD YOU GET US?
This modpack conains all the mods you need for an optimized minecraft experience.
With just a few clicks of your mouse, you can have all the mods you need, without the hassle of downloading them all! _* This excludes most texturepacks_ 
So what are you waiting for, Download the "Rednaxela Optimized" Modpack today!

Please send me any bugs\problems or suggestions so i can make this modpack better then it already is!

also if your chunks dont load correctly then press F3+A to refresh them.
